test_objective: Check that one can query entities with orderBy

test_cases.name: 019_19_01 QueryWithOrderByAttribute
test_cases.doc: Check that one can query entities with orderBy on an attribute
test_cases.when:
when {
    the SUT receives a Request from the client containing:
        URL set to '/ngsi-ld/v1/entities/'
        method set to 'GET'
        Get Entities Request: and
    Query Parameter: entity_types set to 'Building' and
    Query Parameter: orderBy set to '${orderBy}' and
    Query Parameter: Link set to '<$https://easy-global-market.github.io/ngsild-api-data-models/ngsildTestSuite/ngsildTestSuiteV1.8-compound.jsonld>; rel="http://www.w3.org/ns/json-ld#context";type="application/ld+json"'
}
